name: Bethany Westville Baptist Church
description: Bethany Westville Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Westville, SC. There is 1 indoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Camden Pickleball Plaza
description: Come play pickleball at Camden Pickleball Plaza in Camden, SC! There are 12 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Kershaw County Old Armory
description: Kershaw County Old Armory is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Camden, SC. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.
